title: ImpafileConfigurationForGenerators
description: JSON Schema for generator impafile.toml configurations in Impalab

components.description: A list of components defined within this directory.

build.description: Instructions on how to compile or build the component.

command.description: The build tool or executable to run (e.g., 'cargo', 'zig').

args.description: Arguments passed to the build command.

working_dir.description: Working directory for the build command, relative to impafile.toml.

run.description: Instructions on how to run the component executable.

command.description: The executable or runner to run (e.g., 'python3', './run_binary').

args.description: Base arguments passed to the run command.

working_dir.description: Working directory for the run command, relative to impafile.toml.
